implementation_summary: Temporal filtering to nearest pre-biopsy lab, age derivation, string cleanup, censored-value handling (default: set to NaN), decimal normalization, and invalid token replacement.
Rows with missing target (Micro) are removed; rows with >70% missing features are dropped via thresholded row-wise filtering.
Multiple Imputation by Chained Equations (IterativeImputer) with sample_posterior=True; 10 imputed datasets are created with random_state in [0..9] and min_value=0.
Target is encoded via categorize_micro() to task labels; optional StandardScaler is fit on training imputation and applied to downstream splits.
No explicit winsorization/clipping/IQR outlier removal is implemented; extreme or censored operator values are handled through censored-value policy in cleaning.
